scripts.pretauri:build: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$source = Join-Path .. 'src-tauri\target\release\trackmln-tauri.exe'; $payloadRoot = Join-Path 'src-tauri\assets' 'app'; $dest = Join-Path $payloadRoot 'TrackMLN.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $source)) { throw 'Missing main app release binary. Build the main app release first.' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $payloadRoot -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -LiteralPath $source -Destination $dest -Force"
